title: ABC iview
description:
With ABC iview, you can watch live TV and on-demand programs anywhere for free. Easy to use, commercial-free and distinctively Australian.

• Binge the best Australian and international Drama and Comedy all in the one place
• Get the latest breaking ABC NEWS live streams and catch-up programming from Australia’s most trusted news source
• Discover high quality and distinctively Australian Documentaries and Children’s programming
• Watch any ABC broadcast TV channel, live whenever and wherever you are – on mobile, desktop, tablet, Android TV and other streaming devices.
• Continue watching on any device wherever you left off, from mobile, to your desktop computer or Android TV.
• Choose local or national ABC channels live for any state and territory across Australia, wherever you are.

Download ABC iview today and take the best of ABC TV with you anytime, anywhere in Australia.

Latest updates:

It’s now easier for you to find your favourite programs and channels via a Watchlist, and to manage your viewing history.

Find out more about the shows you love with Show Pages, bringing together video extras, and information on hosts, guests and cast.

Accessibility improvements with increased support for voiceover and expanding text sizes.

Please note: This app features Nielsen’s proprietary measurement software which will allow you to contribute to market research.

Please see www.nielsen.com/digitalprivacy for more information.

title: Jigsaw Puzzles - Puzzle Game
description:
Welcome to the colorful world of jigsaw puzzles! Tons of FREE HD pictures, hours of fun and no lost pieces. Relax your mind putting puzzles together!

Indulge yourself and plunge into the wonderful jigsaw world! Enjoy piecing new bright magic jigsaw puzzles together every day!

Our puzzle game includes a large number of beautiful free images of different difficulty levels from easy to hard. The game difficulty is based on the number of puzzle pieces, which should be put together.

If you are excited about solving real jigsaw puzzles, you will definitely love our app as well!

Jigsaw puzzle on your device is as challenging as real one! In addition the jigsaw app is portable, doesn't result into any pieces being lost and encompasses a wide range of puzzle games. All these features make the jigsaw app as attractive as real jigsaw puzzles.

Being a stress relieving and relaxing game, daily jigsaw puzzles for adults will help you to take a break and get rid of the everyday routine.

Discover the colorful world of jigsaw puzzles for free:

· Tons of free beautiful, high quality pictures. Choose from a variety of categories such as Colors, Flowers, Nature, Animals, Art, Landmarks, Hard Puzzles and others
· Daily free puzzle. Get a new HD jigsaw puzzle every day and try to solve it
· Mystery puzzles. Challenge yourself to reveal what is hidden in a picture
· Daily updated gallery. You’ll never run out of free puzzles in our jigsaw box
· Helpful hints. Use Hint to match the next piece to the puzzle if you are stuck
· From 9 to 400 puzzle pieces. The more pieces, the harder your jigsaw puzzle game becomes
· Rotation mode. Turn on rotation, make the game more tricky!
· Custom backgrounds. Choose your favorite appearance to solve free jigsaw puzzle games with more pleasure.

Make every day relaxing and fun putting puzzle pieces together!

title: Pet World – My Animal Hospital – Dream Jobs: Vet
description:
Lacerations, torn muscle fibers and mosquito bites – cute animals in need require your help! As a respected veterinarian, you can take care of sweet pets such as dogs, monkeys, alpacas, and pandas. Manage your own hospital and research new diseases and treatments.

A Variety of Minigames
Whether it’s a bruise, broken paw or a bad intestinal infection – the initial examination shows you the first symptoms of a disease. Here you will set up the diagnosis in a series of exciting minigames. Important tools such as the stethoscope or the thermometer will help you. If you have found the right symptoms, the animal is sent to the appropriate ward. There you can continue treating the pet with other methods, such as X-rays or ultrasound.

Care for 10+ Cute Animals
Cute animals from all over the world will come to your clinic. Friendly cats and dogs from your neighborhood meet exotic species such as ocelots, polar bears, koalas and pandas. They’re all waiting for your care to get well again, and their realistic but cute depiction will steal your heart right away.

Decorate Your Hospital Individually
The more patients you keep healthy, the more your success will get around. Make room for more animals and expand your patient and treatment rooms. Spruce up your halls with new plants, paintings and rugs and place them just where you want them. Improve the outdoor area and offer your patients a breathtaking view of a waterfall.

Manage Your Own Pet Clinic
Keep an eye on your inventory. Food, ointments, medicine and bandages are needed daily – make sure that there are always enough supplies. Every now and then, you’ll find some hidden coins or medical bags on the clinic grounds that will help you keep your stock. Or spin the wheel of fortune several times a day to win many useful prizes.

Together We Are Strong
Of course you can’t complete all these tasks on your own. Hire more nurses and doctors to lend you a hand. They do some work for you and take care of the welfare of your animals.

Postcards From Your Former Patients
You have a scrapbook at your clinic’s reception that you can use to collect receive letters of thanks from your former patients. 

Features
★ Manage your own pet hospital
★ Learn the daily tasks of a veterinarian
★ Examine and care for cute animals
★ Play exciting minigames
★ Collect daily coins and rewards
★ Unlock various treatment rooms
★ Customize your clinic using various decoration Options

Your patients are waiting for you! Start building your veterinary clinic right now and care for adorable animals that need your help.

If you have questions or problems, contact us on our Facebook page: facebook.de/tivolamobile

comments: ["I only gave it 4 stars because, after you buy all the rooms, and animals, there's no more objective. I would love to see more options for animals. Smh!","Really loved playing this until I decided to buy gold during a sale. Big mistake! The game suddenly changed. Level of difficulty increased and you seemed to always need more gold to move on. After playing over 1300 games I am walking away from this game. I refuse to buy another piece of gold. They have managed to make me HATE the game. Don't make the same mistake!","This was my favorite game but what has happened? You win 8 hours free play but there are no more watch videos to get extra play or streaks. This makes it virtually impossible to get through levels. No more watch video for daily piece of gold. Will have to look for similar game from an opposition supplier. Not happy. Far far far too hard now. Total BS","Game glitched in level 323 doesn't matches, same thing in level 417, how could anyone pay for coins and not feel ripped off if you don't get credit for matches. Fun game but too many issues the people who own this game do not care to comment on the problems. Their are levels where you need bubbles , the game does not give you a count for bubbles needed when you make the 3 matches.....fix it and game would be great fun instead of frustrating"]

title: Google Assistant - Get things done, hands-free
description:
Get the Google Assistant for hands-free help

Your Google Assistant is ready to help when and where you need it. Manage your schedule , get help with everyday tasks, control smart home devices, enjoy your entertainment, and much more.

Just start with: "Hey Google"

Play music and videos with your voice

Find music based on a genre, play your favorite songs, playlists, podcasts, and music videos, or find the perfect tunes for activities like cooking, studying, or working out. You can also skip songs and adjust the volume.

"Play workout music"
"Play my Discover Weekly on Spotify"
"Set volume to 5"

Stay in touch with hands-free calls, texts, and emails

Your Assistant makes it fast and easy to stay connected to those who matter most. Make calls, send text messages, and draft emails to your contacts.

"Read my unread texts"
"Call Carly"
"Text Sam 'On my way'"

Get quick directions and local info

Quickly find answers about businesses, restaurants, and attractions, including business hours, traffic info, and Google Maps directions. You can also book a ride with your favorite rideshare company, or find parking lots near your destination.

"How's the traffic to work?"
"Where's the nearest coffee shop?"
"Give me directions to the airport"

Get convenient help throughout the day

Stay on top of your schedule and manage your calendar so you don't forget important appointments and meetings. Set reminders and get alerts so you can check off your daily to-dos. Your Assistant makes it easy to take notes, set timers, add items to your shopping list, and set alarms.

"Remind me to drink water every morning"
"Add eggs and bread to my shopping list"
"Set an alarm for 7 AM"

Search the web and get quick answers

Find fast answers to your questions while you're out and about, or at home. Get real-time weather forecasts and updates, find how-to videos, check sports scores, search the web, or get language translations when you're abroad.

"What’s the weather this weekend?"
"How much is $50 in euros?"
"Tell me the latest news"

*Your device must still meet the requirements in order to use the Google Assistant.
*You do not need this app to use the Google Assistant if you already have the Google Assistant on your device.

comments: ["I love the Google assistant app it is great. It does so many things for you like set your alarm clock. Add things to your Google calendar. Look stuff up on the Internet. Give you information that you're looking for without having to actually go in to the Google app and look stuff up with your hand. You can do it all by just the speak of your mouth. How great is that. If you're super busy then this is the app for you! It get stuff done very fast by just talking not typing and touching your phone!","I was really was getting used to this assistant and then suddenly it doesn't respond to \"Hey Google\" anymore! What's up with this? I can no longer say \"Hey Google....call dad home\" and not have to pull over to the side of the road, dial dad's house, and talk, then hangup and get back on the road. Previously when I used to use this app, I could have my \"assistant\" dial my call, let me talk hands free, then hang up hands free too! Fix it please?!","One of the best apps for most potential that Google has. I Always look forward to updates for Google Assistant. I can't wait till they raise it to the next level. My dream is always been a Google Assistant with better conversational skills. But until then I'll still give it five stars, that's by far my favorite app. I just want to say thanks to the developers for making such a cool app.","It was great at first but now its just so annoying! It keeps popping up when im listening to music! I tried to disable it but it doesnt work! Everytime i say something with my headphones on, it pops up! It can be useful at times but I absolutely dislike that it doesnt listen. Whenever you say something that it cant understand, it just stops and the app hangs. Pls help fix this or pls tell me how to stop it from disrupting my music. I dont mean to be rude but i cant stand it anymore. 😒😕😤","I loved using the assistant but now it is horrible! It never pops up when I say \"Ok Google\". I am using a Pixel 3a and followed all the necessary steps to make it right. But no use. When I open it up on my own, it still takes a long time to recognize the words. There are so many reviews with similar problems. Is Google gonna fix this up ? Very disappointed."]

comments: ["I remember playing this game years ago and it was great. I reinstalled it again now, and every time I restart, I get an ad - every time. Not to mention it trying to get me to buy a VIP membership (which is obscenely expensive, it's just a scam at this point). It's becoming unplayable. It's not worth downloading anymore. The game is fun, but the ads make it unplayable. Don't waste your time, don't download it.","This game is awesome, but the ads are very annoying and its trying to get me to buy a vip membership and im still a child!, (i'm only 14), look, this game was my favorite in the past and it still is but the ads and the vip stuff are too much and is ruining all the fun im sopposed to have, instead of havung fun while playing this game, all i get are so many ads and some VIP membership that i dont even want!, its really annoying!, so many ads here and there!, fix this!","The game is well optimized and fun. However, the implementation of a subscription service and incessant adds at the end of every level are just plain greedy. Do not allow any children to play this game unless they are old enough to understand credit card safety. The game's goal isn't to entertain as before but to trick you into buying with your money.","Good game overall but an ad every 2 levels... when a level is generally 3-8 seconds long, you spend more time looking at those stupid things than playing the game! I'm not paying for the ad free version as it's only something I use to entertain the kids so free games are ideal.","Played this game years ago, loved it for it's creativity and at times challenging puzzles.. i bought the full version back then for 1 dollar. all of its content included. now... it's 10$ a month and there's still ads on that version. it's so sad to see people so consumed by money they pull these kind of scams. also, this game is obscenely ad-ridden. seems all mobile games are nowadays. just sad."]

title: Tomb of the Mask
description:
Tomb of the Mask is an arcade game with an infinite procedurally generated vertical labyrinth. Seeking for adventure you get into a tomb where you find a strange mask. You put it on and suddenly realize that you can now climb walls - easily and promptly. And that's when all the fun begins. 

You'll face a variety of traps, enemies, game mechanics and power-ups. And as far as time doesn't wait, get a grip and up you go.

You'll face a variety of traps, enemies, game mechanics and power-ups. And as far as time doesn't wait, get a grip and up you go.

comments: ["This is an good game made it to level 51 but for some reason, I CAN'T GET MY LIFES BACK, I waited 2 days, and the life counter is still at 0! I even turned the wifi off and on, I tried everything, I have to watch an ad for 1 energy and that's getting annoying, so can ya PLEASE do something about this, I wont be able to play this anymore, I'm gonna have to start from the beginning.","It is a very addictive game. In the new update, there are lesser ads, but it lags a lot. Even while playing, when I swipe to my direction, it lags and sometimes goes in the other direction, leading to loose an energy. Dn't play this game if you are afraid of sharp things such as needles, because there are a lot of them.","So first of all, this is a wonderful game! I've been playing for months, and it's just as entertaining as when I first got it. Sadly I have to give it 3/5 stars because out of nowhere, the game just wouldn't load. The app opened, but the screen just turned black and nothing happened. I tried tons of things, but it just didn't work. This really disappointed me because I had just reached level 150 and I had to delete it because it wasn't working. Hopefully it gets fixed because I truly enjoy it.","Tomb of the Mask is an amazing, addicting, and somewhat frustrating game. I downloaded it while searching Google Play for \"Arcade\" games, but ran into an issue. I haven't even started recording yet I'm at level 70. It's addicting and it tests you at times. You have to learn to be patient, because timing is everything on some levels. Other levels you have to move fast. I highly recommend this game to others if you're looking for something fun yet challenging to pass the time. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐","I LOVE this app. It's not like any other mobile game. It's like an arcade game, while other games are the basic 3d and animated. It cause you to think 2 steps ahead while also going fast, and other apps usually just repeat them self's after a while. The ads aren't as bad as other games. They have you watch ads for a reward, and then show you an ad once and while. The only thing bad is that it can get frustrating, which is good because it means it's challenging me and testing my brain."]

title: Google Pixel Buds
description:
Set up and manage your Pixel Buds right from your Android 6.0+ device with the Google Pixel Buds app. You can easily check your earbuds and case battery levels, and control features like Adaptive Sound, in-ear detection, find device, Google Assistant, and spoken notifications.

    Here are some of the things you can do with the Google Pixel Buds app:

    • Check battery levels
    • Learn how to use touch controls
    • Turn on/off Adaptive Sound
    • Turn on/off in-ear detection
    • Ring your earbuds to help find them
    • Control your Assistant and spoken notifications
    • Get tips & support

    To open the Pixel Buds app:
    • On Pixel, connect your earbuds > Bluetooth settings > tap the ⚙️next to Pixel Buds.
    • On other Android phones, look for the Pixel Buds app icon on your Home screen.

    Note: This app is for Google Pixel Buds (2nd Gen)
descriptionHTML:
Set up and manage your Pixel Buds right from your Android 6.0+ device with the Google Pixel Buds app. You can easily check your earbuds and case battery levels, and control features like Adaptive Sound, in-ear detection, find device, Google Assistant, and spoken notifications.

summary: The companion app for your Pixel Buds
recentChanges: Welcome to your new Google Pixel Buds
comments: ["Severe connection issues. One earbud consistently drops out. I have reset it multiple times. There is an update available but the headphones refused to update. I did see I got a developer response, but could not view it. Any help would be appreciated. Update:. so I installed l the new software and it was fine for the first day. Now I am getting cut outs in my right ear bud. It's not clogged. It's clean, I've reset and restart the numerous times. And the right one seems to cut out.","I have had no problems with this app or the pixel buds after the new update (firmware 550) except for one. Nothing changed in the app. From looking at the update notes it said that there would be a bass boost option and more inside of the app but currently it's the same as before. I'm mighty confused as i have had no previous problems with this app or the buds","These are the only wireless headphones that actually stay in my ear so they're great from that perspective. However the Bluetooth connectivity is terrible. I was excited to wear these while I mowed my lawn but I heard was a crackling in my left ear or silence. The right ear was also off and on but worked better. The first time my left ear just didn't work so I deleted and reinstalled the app, then it worked better. Update: I was jumping rope and the buds fell out.","Overall have very much enjoyed the Pixel Buds. They integrate really well with my Pixel 3 phone. I have also experienced some issues indicated by others. And generally, they can be a little buggy at times: cutouts at times and when reconnect the sound is weird is one example. However, overall they've been solid. Looking forward to bass boost!","Love the design and the sound on these, however i noticed that the battery life is poor, i literally had them in the case for 24 hours and it was dead, i don't understand how battery drains while not in use?? am i missing something? the google pixel buds 2 are a great concept and again made very well. However something is not right that they drain at different levels and that they don't even last a full day."]

title: Swamp Attack
description:
Your swamp is under attack! Grab a weapon and defend your home from the invading monsters, like crazed zombie-style monsters, crocodiles, aliens and more!

Come up with a strategy! Shoot weapons. Beat the monsters. Survive the attack and secure your home. The evil monsters may know no mercy, but you can beat them all – every single monster is a fun challenge!

We’ve got dynamite, flamethrowers, crossbows, blob-throwers, molotov cocktails, and more for you to use against the zombie-style critters! So get ready to SHOOT! Prepare your ATTACK! And PROTECT your home as you play the best action-packed shooter game around!


★★★ARE YOU READY TO COME UP WITH THE BEST STRATEGY TO BEAT THE MONSTERS?★★★

- Shoot with different guns by TAPPING THE SCREEN.
- DRAG AND DROP the explosives onto the monsters.
- Don’t miss a beat – SWITCH between weapons during the action!
- UPGRADE and equip yourself with guns and bombs before starting a new level.
- Drink a potion to CONTINUE PLAYING if you get killed, or to instantly top up your energy.

Just like players defend their towers in the best tower defense games, you have to defend your home and your swamp!

Play this action-packed, super cool tower defense game and have fun for free! Try out the Challenge mode and test your limits! When you win, you can have even more fun attempting the even more challenging multiplayer mode!

So, are you ready to play one of the most exciting games out there?!

8 action-packed EPISODES!
390 fun SINGLE-PLAYER LEVELS!
40 cool MULTIPLAYER LEVELS!
QUICK MISSIONS for instant excitement!
More than 30 awesome DEFENSE TOOLS like the mighty shotgun, the reckless minigun, and the super atom bomb.
More than 45 different MONSTERS running wild, each with their own special attacks!

DOWNLOAD NOW & PLAY!

Swamp Attack is a free game, with the option to purchase items to help you progress through the levels faster.

This app contains:
- Promotion of Outfit7's products and contextual advertising;
- Links that direct customers to our websites and other Outfit7 apps;
- The option to make in-app purchases;
- The option to invite Facebook friends for in-game rewards; and
- The option to play against other users.

Terms of use: http://outfit7.com/eula/
Privacy policy: http://outfit7.com/privacy-policy/
Customer support: support@outfit7.com

Quite sad cause I really enjoyed this game. :(","This game is definitely the best I've played on a phone. Great gameplay and graphics. The developers are top notch with customer service. So far, so good, and i know if i have any further issues they'll be quick to address them. Don't hesitate to try out this game app. It's definition worth it. And thank you again to the developers."]

title: Minecraft
description:
Explore infinite worlds and build everything from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles. Play in creative mode with unlimited resources or mine deep into the world in survival mode, crafting weapons and armor to fend off dangerous mobs. Create, explore and survive alone or with friends on mobile devices or Windows 10.

EXPAND YOUR GAME:
Marketplace - Discover the latest community creations in the marketplace! Get unique maps, skins, and texture packs from your favorite creators. 

Slash commands - Tweak how the game plays: you can give items away, summon mobs, change the time of day, and more. 

Add-Ons - Customize your experience even further with free Add-Ons! If you're more tech-inclined, you can modify data-driven behaviors in the game to create new resource packs.

MULTIPLAYER
Realms - Play with up to 10 friends cross-platform, anytime, anywhere on Realms, your own private server that we host for you. Try a free 30-day trial in-app.

Multiplayer - Play with up to 4 friends with a free Xbox Live account online.
Servers - Join free massive multiplayer servers and play with thousands of others! Discover gigantic community-run worlds, compete in unique mini-games and socialize in lobbies full of new friends!

SUPPORT: https:///www.minecraft.net/help
LEARN MORE: https:///www.minecraft.net/

comments: ["The game is awesome and I have played it for YEARS. I love the game and enjoyed it. But the reason why I gave 1 star is I suddenly cannot sign in to my account after the update. The game keeps crashing whenever I press 'sign in'. Uninstall and reinstall MANY TIMES but it still not working. I hope you fix it so that I can change my review.","I think there is always room for improvement. It should be easier for a Family member to play with their child. My child is 5. Why can't people on the same wifi network connect to their own private game? Mom & daughter want to play together. Also, I wish we could put ourselves in 3rd person so we can see more of ourselves than just our hand.","I love this game, I always will, and always have, since I was 7,this is a truly inspirational game, it helps me think and get my creativity flowing, I can play tons Of games on different servers with my friends, the patches and bugs are very rare to come by, and it nice to know they put in effort to make this the very best game, with frequent updates,","Overall this game is amazing! But for the past month or two I've been experiencing some problems. Whenever I go to the \"servers\" tab it dosn't actually show the servers, all it says is \"add server\". I've tried fixing this problem by resetting my phone, uninstalling and reinstalling the app, and logging out of my account. Nothing has worked so far. Another problem with the servers is sometimes it just keeps loading and loading.. Please fix this! :(","Its pay to play. Not only do you pay $7 for this game alone, you also have to pay for \"passes\" which cost a lot. You wanna play with friends? Sorry you have to pay a monthly fee for that. You wanna play prision? Nope, you have to purchase a monthly pass. Want texture packs? You gotta pay for that too. The controls are also terrible and controller support is a joke. Just get the Java version. Everything is free."]

title: Galaxy Attack: Alien Shooter
description:
Earth's last hope is in your hands, take control of the lone spaceship and protect Earth from alien swarms. Your goal will be quite challenging as you will have to save the Universe from its evil enemies. In this space shooting game, you will be facing an increasingly large number of enemies in hazardous environments. As the game progresses, you will earn the right to upgrade your spacecraft to unleash its full lethal capacity.

HOW TO PLAY:
* Touch screen to move and kill all enemies.
* Collect items to upgrade or change your weapons.

FEATURES:
* Multiplayer mode: 1 vs 1, 1 vs 3
* High quality images optimized for tablets and large screens.
* Ability to use active skills during the space battles.
* The game is packed with 160+ levels on various difficulties.
* Beautiful levels with immersive missions to complete. 
* Multiple extreme boss battles. 
* Upgrade your guns and lasers.

Enjoy classic space combat - powered up. Download Galaxy Attack: Alien Shooter now!
Follow us on Facebook:
https://www.facebook.com/GalaxyAttack
Join Group with us
https://www.facebook.com/groups/GalaxyAttackAlienShooter

comments: ["The game is absolutely irritating.... It is very good, with lots of different options and games, definitely very well designed BUT.... It has no sense of fairness in the Player VS Player option. It always awards one of the 2 players with a high-end weapon, making it almost impossible for the other player to win the game. It is obvious that this is done on purpose as the developers could easily have done something to correct it. If you don't want to smash your phone you'd better avoid it!","I love the game itself however there is always bugs that keep getting worse, they keep taking your money and your items, progress, rewards not given or \"dissapear\". They will not fix errors to your account even with proof and ignore you completely after you message them and tell them what is happening and what needs to be fixed back to your game account. Don't waste your time or DEFINITELY NOT YOUR MONEY. You will get scammed.","Ok so several months later and I still really love this game. If you're into this game like I enjoy it, I do put money in and yes it does make getting through tough lvls much easier. It's frustrating, fun, and very challenging. I'd also say it helps with focus too. The game does bug here and there. So make it a point to go to settings and save your progress as you go. Especially after purchases and upgrades. Finally, the developers are easy to contact and make things right.","I like the game, it's very addicting, my problem however is that you have to spend money to get the three last ships, for upgrades, and some items that are only found in clan shops you have to have clan gold to purchase, and I don't know how to get clan gold, and there's no way to get enough crystals to purchase or trade, and that's the thing I don't like about it there are no other way by which we can obtain them","The game mandates we update in order to play it, then functionality is lost. For example, can't get into Tournaments. We receive a pop up we need to update. I'm running the latest update. Support requests are directed to Facebook chat. The requests aren't answered. Play at your own choice, my recommendation is not to spend any money on the game. **Update Aug 28, 2020; my review still stands. I never had my message or request for assistance returned by support. My comments above still stand."]

title: Hunting Clash: Hunter Games - Shooting Simulator
description:
The 2020 hunting season has started! Dust off your gun, travel to hunting locations on your mobile and observe wild animals in their natural habitat. Ready to hunt? Let’s play Hunting Clash - a next-generation shooting game!

Breathtaking shooting areas
Visit the most impressive hunting locations in mobile games! Hunt in the woods of Montana, in the freezing cold forest of Kamchatka, embark on a hunting safari in Africa (Namibia) and many more! Stunning views, realistic wild animals and scary beasts! Feel the thrill of big game hunter in the free hunting game like never before! It’s much more than other free shooting games. 

A shooting game on your mobile
Track animals in the wild - deer, elk, grizzly bear, wolf, duck and many more. Choose an animal, aim and shoot! Animal hunter games are a combination of shooting games and sniper arena genres. Get ready to experience the real sniper shooting in the wilderness.

Hunt or be hunted
Shooting is a bread and butter of every hunter. But does killing animals is your only goal? Nope, because there are tons of events to participate every day! You have to show off your tracking and aiming skills like in the best shooting games and hunting games! Hunt for specific wild animals like deer or in specific locations in Africa, USA, Russia and more. Fulfill goals and level up your hunter game!

A weapon of your choice
A sniper rifle or a bow? The choice is yours. Gun hunting is much more popular than bow hunting, but bow shooting still has admirers amongst old-fashioned hunters - especially on a deer hunt. Whether you prefer gun hunting or bow hunting, there are plenty of upgrades to choose. Enhance your shooting gear and shoot animals with deadly precision.

Compete against other hunters
Who said hunting a game is a solo sport? Hunting games are much more exciting while playing with others! Go deer hunting in 1v1 PvP duels and become a real big game hunter. The call of the wild - it’s what drives you to the top of leaderboards. Become a master hunter, get epic loot and show off who’s the best in this animal shooting game.

Wanna join a Hunter Club?
Join forces with fellow hunters and compete against others for the title of the best Hunter Club. Share gear and experience, fulfill Club’s goals and socialize. Whether you prefer to hunt solo or shoot a duel in PvP hunting games, in Hunter Clubs there’s something for every hunter.

Graphics like in AAA hunting games
See the bear fur? Wolf pelts? A vivid, realistic deer? Hunting for animals like these is a real pleasure. Add superior looking grass, trees and weather effects. It’s so real you can actually smell the big game you’ve hunted for! It’s an AAA quality of hunting games on your mobile!

Answer the call of the wild and unite with your gun to hunt animals like a big game hunter. Track wild animals, collect hunter gear and observe nature’s beauty. Look no further for other hunter games. Play Hunting Clash – one of the most exciting hunting games ever made! Download now for free and start your adventure with an animal hunting games.

comments: ["Pretty good, not a fan of how it will bug sometimes and freeze up but I know its just a game. One crappy part is eg: bobcats have a spinal target and I can have the aim perfect on the circle and it will say it missed. Also wish there was a bit more realiatic action from the animals. Not sure that all these animals would so calmly sit around eachother. Maybe even make a zoom and put some groups further away from prey like animals.","Love this game better than fishing clash Please fix glitches though it closes during game play and crashes I have lost more duels and points due to this .I believe you have some tech issues that need to be corrected .Still a great game unless it crashes .I could be a lot further on this game if it wouldnt continue to stop and close when it reopens it shows defeat should start over but doesnt it racks me up for a loss and I lose power ups too much .Thanx","How incredibly disappointing is this update that took a 5 star game to a zero star. I have to cancel out after several minutes of trying to start the game. It loads differently (read badly) now. After many minutes of waiting and 20+ loads of hunters I gave up.. tried 5 times. You need to sack whoever decided to add lodges as you lost me and I g/tee many thousands who simply will not bother telling you how badly you have screwed up. Such a shame as the graphics were great the interface intuitive","A nice way to hunt without actually killing any animals. After unlocking a new hunting ground, it takes about 5 minutes to know what to expect, from where will the animals arrive, how will they behave etc. The animals look very realistic, but act totally out of nature. Real lions are lazy and are just lying in one spot, very well camouflaged. The lions in the game are fidgety and doesn't lie still. Cheeetah are solitary animals and you rarely se more than one at a time. Wild dogs are pack animal","This was my favourite hunting game as it keeps things nice and simple and I could enjoy it without spending real cash. But! I have not been getting any bonus power ups when I level up and that is a problem. If you can fix that I may change my rating."]

comments: ["Fast paced and challenging!! Never a full moment! The enemy comes at you in groups- shooting at you! Their mission is to damage your ship and take you down before you can take them out. Your mission is to take all the enemy ships down so you can conquer the Boss -the ultimate machine- will you defeat the Boss? The challenge has begun!!! We must save the galaxy!!!","Game is really cool at first. Also if you got time for adds you'll make it to the second world. Be careful though, you'll get so far and then be stuck and forced to put money on the game to go any further no matter how many adds you watch. Its definitely a blast at first but if you're looking for a game to play and not have to spend money to advance then this game is definitely not for you.","Great game!! Highlights include great events, altering your spaceships power, and mini-games with great rewards. Hang in there with this game and in time, you'll build an arsenal. I should know, i've been playing this game for over two years and have invested maybe forty bucks into the game. Patience is a must. Will you endeavor?","It is a fun game, however, think it could be better. Why is it that we only have one ship? Why not start out with 3. Most video games give you 3 ships with the chance to earn more. Why is it that the ship gets hit once and blows up. But it takes more than one hit to kill an enemy ship? I understand that the game should be challenging, but it should still be somewhat fair.","So, when you go in, you will notice 6 ships are locked behind paywalls, most of them capable of giving you bonus score in pvp. 1 is in a bundle for like 2 dollars while another 2 are $19.99 (9.99 on sale) and the others can cost as low as $2 to $5 for their lowest power, or 100s of dollars for max power. Their new pvp lets you pick 4 ships, but only 3 slots are open until, you guessed it, pay 1.99 for it (Hey, at least it is cheap, I guess.) Solo play and guilds are free though, so there's that."]

title: My Singing Monsters
description:
Welcome to My Singing Monsters! Breed them, feed them, listen to them sing! 

Raise a monster pet, then feed your musical monster to help them grow. Take care of a collection of fun monster characters in this free musical game for the whole family!

Create an island full of Singing Monsters, then watch your song evolve as you breed and upgrade happy monster pets. Design and build unique decorations to make your world look just the way you want, then share your creation with friends! You'll love exploring the wonderful fantasy land of the Monster World!

Download My Singing Monsters today — Happy Monstering!

FEATURES:
• Collect and level up over 150 cute and funny monsters — dragons are so last year…
• Customize your islands with cool decorations and catchy music
• Enjoy awesome graphics and character animation
• Play with friends around the world
• Discover new updates and events year-round
________

comments: ["I will be honest I don't know if the game is \"for me\" or not yet. That said the game is exactly as described and definitely hits its mark for its target audience. Each monster is unique and the casualness of just slowly building up your band is relaxing. I personally prefer games you can play for longer in one sitting without the need of special currency (though they make sure diamonds aren't off limits to people unwilling to spend money), but this game should satisfy idle players.","Awesome game but I've noticed that there are some problems. One, the mini mine only gives you 1 diamond, why?! Second, you have to pay money to get exclusive things that would normally need to be a curtain level like the wubbox. Third some of the breeding time is excruciatingly long, like, 1 DAY?! WHAT THE HECK!? But other than that, it's pretty fun.","So far I am very happy with this game! It is very simple, yet fun. And it is very interesting to how creative other players can get. I just wish breeding was faster. Your 5th or so monster will take an hour! One hour to breed, another to incubate. Thankfully, you can watch an ad to speed up 15 minutes. Which is nice because most ads are 15-30 seconds. There is so much choices for your song. And on composer island, you can write the song! It's even already unlocked.","while waiting for stuff time out. Ya know? It needs more side games lke the memory and spin the wheel games. More opportunties to geti gems and pecial monsters. I wish tbey were more available to us free players...hint hint! Super fun! What's up with only getting 100 coins for prize in the match game? Like no matter what?Anyway..thanks for a great time!","Game is amazing! LOTS to do, and music is good. I love the evolution of the songs as you add monsters and the ability to essentially mix it with volume control is a bonus! Composer island is especially cool. Would be cool to have a bit more control and features on composer island, such as more rhythm customisability. The one bad thing about the game is the reward system for the memory game, it's rigged. Really doesn't make sense. This one thing is why I can't give 5 stars."]

- 1600+ levels.
- Juicy and colorful game world.

recentChanges: Bug fixes.
comments: ["On my Android Samsung phone, it takes up to 5 mins or longer to get anything loaded. It has Ads showing up constantly which takes away from the game. It will also freeze on multiple screens and knocks me out of the game completely-taking me back to my phone's home screen. If you tap on the pineapple, it will take me to another game advertisment. When playing game boards, it takes forever for the cubes to disappear & I keep getting the message that the game isn't responding. VERY IRRITATED!","I enjoy the game...when it works. This game and others in the genre will periodically freeze,disappear mid-play,or the page will separate. One half is the game,the other part is an ad. Very frustrating. I used to enjoy playing but now almost ready to delete all of them. Please fix this and other similar games.","If you like this type of game, this is it. All ads are 5 sec or less. There is a power up available for every level, more if you want to watch an ad. No coins, no contests (by level 150), and no one trying to make you spend money for anything. Just the GAME","This game is very intertaining nd educational bc it can also help w/ math problems in adding nd subtracting but addicted to others like me , also can refresh my memory once in a while . There are times when i start to play late late at night nd can' t stop like rite now , whitch im about to do bc i need to finish something in the kitchen then get ready for my beauty sleep . Good night now. ☺😔💜 .","Nice game. I like the fact that this game doesn't cheat like so many others. The boosts you get in the beginning are as strong when you begin the game as they are when you're on a higher level. Right now I'm on level 58 and the boosts are just as strong."]

title: Word Cookies!®
description:
🍪 Here come some tasty Word Cookies hot out of the oven! Take a bite! 🍪 
Word Cookies is an addictive cross between all the word games you love! With so many exciting challenges, you'll soon be obsessed with testing your spelling and vocabulary limits to make as many words as you can!

HOW TO PLAY
• Swipe the alphabet cookies on the baking pan to spell words.
• Fill up Jack's cookie jar with extra words you find to earn coins!

SPECIAL FEATURES
• LOTS OF LEVELS: We are always adding more levels to the 2000+ we already have!
• KEEPS YOUR BRAIN ACTIVE: Highly entertaining & educational for everyone!
• DAILY REWARDS: Play everyday to earn bonus rewards!
• HINTS AVAILABLE: Shuffle the letters to spark your memory, or use hints to get clues!
• NO TIME LIMITS: Take your time and go at your own pace!
• FREE TO PLAY: The word puzzles are all free, but you can pay for extra hints or to remove ads.
• SUPPORTED ON VARIOUS DEVICES: Enjoy on smartphone or tablet!

PRIVACY POLICY
• https://www.bitmango.com/privacy-policy/

comments: ["Used to be a fun game, where you would get decent coin rewards after completing ranks, daily spin would often give you 30, 50 coins or hints and picks, now I'm lucky if I get a 15 coin on spin. Weekend bake off - another coin reward drop. All that for words that are so special a non-native speaker such as myself has not had a chance to meet. Which would be ok if the rewards for finding it was woth it. I won't be giving this game any more chances and am uninstalling. Go find a better one.","It's a lot of fun for about the first 30 levels. I'd seen reviews complaining about the ads, but I didn't know that they were right. A full-screen ad between every/every other short puzzle. Basically, if you play this, about 50% of the time you're in this app will JUST BE ADS. Now, I understand apps need ad revenue to work. Ad banners at the bottom of the screen? Fine. Making it optional to get extra coins and such by watching an ad? Sure! But this is outrageous. I had to uninstall it.","I love the challenge of this game but am sick of waiting for more levels. I ran out of levels over a month ago!! My only other complaint is the lack of bonus for completing a chef rank. I play offline so don't have the ad problems that others seem to be experiencing. Edit: I notice that the bonus for completing packs has halved and the bake-off bonus in now only 50 instead of 200. Still nothing for completing a rank. Lost a star for that development...","I enjoy this game I've been playing it regularly for several months. unfortunately I've started having problems where it doesn't work right. Can't get the swipe to work and sometimes the game just freezes. I hope the issue gets fixed soon.","I do like this game - good for filling time while waiting, for example. However, there are some common words that don't seem to be in its dictionary, while obsolete words are still included. The word \"dime\", for example, as of this review, is not in the game even as an extra word. That's all."]

title: Google Lens
description:
Google Lens lets you search what you see, get things done faster, and understand the world around you—using just your camera or a photo.

  SCAN & TRANSLATE TEXT
  Translate words you see, save a business card to your contacts, add events to your calendar from a poster, and copy and paste complicated codes or long paragraphs into your phone to save time.

  IDENTIFY PLANTS & ANIMALS
  Find out what that plant is in your friend's apartment, or what kind of dog you saw in the park.

  EXPLORE PLACES AROUND YOU
  Identify and learn about landmarks, restaurants, and storefronts. See ratings, hours of operation, historical facts, and more.

  FIND THE LOOK YOU LIKE
  See an outfit that catches your eye? Or a chair that's perfect for your living room? Find similar clothes, furniture, and home decor to the one you like.

  KNOW WHAT TO ORDER
  See popular dishes on a restaurant menu based on reviews from Google Maps.

  SCAN CODES
  Quickly scan QR codes and barcodes.

  *Limited availability and not available in all languages or regions. For further details go to g.co/help/lens. Some Lens features require an internet connection.

comments: ["Awesome! This is incredible. I tested the app with random things I'd pass throughout the day, and every time, without fail, it found the exact product and also showed me similar options. I'm finding it particularly good at presenting less expensive alternatives that achieve the same look and at the same time, the same exact product for less on other sites.","Everything is perfect, but I would love it more if the translation option contains an extra feature of taking a screenshot with a separate button on the apps somewhere. It will be really very helpful, please consider it. Because whenever I tfy to translate something through this app, I hardly have the ability to take screenshot by pressing 2 different button at once, you know what I mean. Rather giving an extra feature of taking a screenshot could bring extra value and flexibility. Thanks!","For nearly a month and a half Lens has not been working, and the developers have been ignoring my reviews. I wonder why anyone uses any of their products? 9/15/2020.; Try to use it, get a message thanking me for updating lens and telling me it will be available soon. For about three weeks, and no response from the developer. Disabled, uninstalled updates, restarted, enabled & updated, and same stupid message. Too bad I can't rate it 0 Stars. Useless!","(Aclaration: this review is about the lens option n Google photos mainly). Lens has always been very useful but since the last 2/3 weeks it don't find any results at all. I use mainly the Lens option in Photos and just installed this one. I use a One Plus 5T A5010 on Android oxygen 9.0.11. The message on my screen is \"Something went Wong. You will get notified when lens results are ready.\" (Thing that don't happen) I tried it being connected to different wifis. Could you help me please.","I was able to identify Blue-eyed Grass with this app, when Plantnet and iNaturalist apps were unable to...It is a dream come true..lol..so far and for the first time ever, Amber and I stopped to photograph an amazing rainbow ring around the sun and used this app to identify our pictures...it was called a \"Sun Dog\"..I'm keeping this app😍"]

title: PictureThis: Identify Plant, Flower, Weed and More
description:
Instantly identify plants. Accurate, fast and content rich! In addition to description and plant care tips, enjoy beautiful plant pictures around the world.

PictureThis helps more than 30,000,000 users identify, learn, and enjoy all kinds of plants: flowers, trees, succulents, cacti and more!

When you take a walk during sunny days, have you ever come across a beautiful flower you would know more about? When you’re doing gardening work, have you ever needed tips on plant caring? Simply take a photo of the plant, PictureThis answers all the questions for you.

PictureThis is capable of identifying 10,000+ plant species with accuracy of 98%, better than most human experts. With revolutionary artificial intelligence engine, it’s constantly learning from experts and specialists, identify more and better everyday. And now it’s all at your fingertips! Picture this plant, and enjoy!



Key Features:

- Instantly identify thousands of plants, flowers, and trees with advanced artificial intelligence
- Learn about plants and discover beautiful plant pictures taken by our users around the world
- Get suggestions and advice from a network of friendly horticulture specialists
--Plant care tips and water reminders, help you better grow your lovely plants
- Easy-to-use interface with friendly guides, help you get the best photo
- Quickly and easily share your photos with a growing community of plant lovers
- Keep track of all the plants, trees, and flowers you identify in your own personal collection

PictureThis team hopes to build a vibrant community for plant lovers and help more people know more about plants. PictureThis is also a recommended-app on Google Play.


CONNECT WITH US
Facebook.com/PictureThisAI
Twitter.com/PictureThisAI
Instagram.com/PictureThisAI

comments: ["It's a super app with more than ninety percent accuracy, which I think is very good indeed. You do have to cross check at times, which is understandable because no app can be one hundred percent on the bullseye. Since I write about herbal remedies and products, I sometimes have to go to forests in search of plants. This app comes in handy for identifying unknown specimens quickly. Also helpful are the diagnostic features on plant problems and tips about how to overcome them!","Great app, large plant database and so far, it's gotten it every time. I don't like how they trick you into going premium (20$ charge comes automatically after 7 days if you don't remember to change your preferences). Actually, I originally gave it a bad review because of that, but have come back to change it because it ended up performing so well.","It's a super app with more than ninety percent accuracy, which I think is very good indeed. You do have to cross check at times, which is understandable because no app can be one hundred percent on the bullseye. Since I write about herbal remedies and products, I sometimes have to go to forests in search of plants. This app comes in handy for identifying unknown specimens quickly. Also helpful are the diagnostic features on plant problems and tips about how to overcome them!","I enjoy being able to see at a glance what the names are for different plants. I also enjoy finding out about the plants and I particularly wanted to know the best time to prune the shrubs and trees. However, the app on my phone appears to have been updated and this did cause a slight problem. The app does appear to have a flaw. I was checking a plant which I believed was a niger plant (from bird feed). I took different photos and they appeared to have different names.","I Love it, love it, love it. Oh by the way, did I mention that I love this app! Awesome! I sometimes have to redo my pictures but that depends I think all on the phone you're using I mean that's just common sense that something an app cannot help. Anyways I'm a new user and what I see so far I like. Thank You. Blessings of Enlightenment unto us all."]

title: Tomb of the Mask: Color
description:
This time the mystic mask and your passion for adventure led you into a new kind of maze. 

Moving from wall to wall, you need to paint over every corner of the labyrinth to make your way to the next one. But beware: some of them are not as safe as they seem to be...

We Love You. Enjoy.

We are ready to make your game experience even greater! Bugs are fixed and game performance is optimized. Enjoy!

Our team reads all reviews and always tries to make the game better. Please leave us some feedback if you love what we do and feel free to suggest any improvements.
comments: ["What you see in advertisment: draw your own level and then complete it. What you actually get: just another tomb of mask game with just a little different gameplay. Fans of the game will love it, but the guys like me who saw the ad and then had got only half of the ad in game... Wouldn't be so sure. They could've at least add a few levels where you can draw without paying. Sorry if they have, I've played really few levels.","Wow, this game is totally awesome! I played everyday and I feel very relaxing. This game make my day more clear and good. I found different characters on the level and some of it is creepy and not creepy! This game is very frickin awesome! I never felt so better when I played this game before! Thanks for making this game and fixing the bugs!","This game is only playable if you purchase no ads. It was enjoyable until level 242. Once you get to level 242, they make it completely impossible to beat unless you watch an ad. I thought that was really gross and unethical so I uninstalled it. If you're not willing to watch ads, don't bother getting it because for every 5 seconds of gameplay you watch 30 seconds of ads.","The game is interesting and a great time passer, nice simplistic pixle graphics and fun sound effects to go with it...now, forgive me if i sound needy but WHY IS EVERY AD UNSKIPPABLE? I'd understand if i asked for the ads, like, if i wanted a costume or a few extra coins, but I'm just playing the game normally and they pop up, and so often too! What brings the score down to 3 instead of 4 is the fact that the original Tomb of the Mask had less ads and were skippable if they came up unprompted...","It's also SOoOoOoOo addictive. Keep up the awesome work. I feel like there should be different characters and bonus levels. There should also be a coin count at the top so you know how many coins there are. That's why I'm rating it 3 stars. Hopefully you could add thos ethings to make the game even better!"]

title: Farm Heroes Saga
description:
Farm Heroes Saga, from the makers of Candy Crush Soda Saga & Bubble Witch 3 Saga! 

Rancid the Racoon is trying to spoil the precious Farm Lands, stealing as many Cropsies as he can along the way. Join forces with the Farm Heroes and help collect the Cropsies to save the day! Play through hundreds of levels solving puzzles by switching, matching and collecting Cropsies across the farm! 

Match 3 or more Cropsies to collect them, plan your moves for bigger and better matches to reach that all important high score! Explore farmtastic adventures across a variety of game modes and puzzles including Rancid boss battles!

Farm Heroes Saga has a wealth of boosters and power ups to help you out along the way! Make the most of Hero Mode when you have moves to spare, Hero Mode lets you earn extra points which makes those big matches even more worthwhile! 

Farm Heroes Saga features: 
● Collect all kinds of Cropsies to win the level before you run out of moves
● Relaxing match 3 gameplay
● Hero Mode: Earn extra points when you have moves to spare!
● Play levels and win magic beans to help you activate Farm Club 
● Reach for the stars in the Tractor Dash, challenge friends to collect stars for rewards
● Rechargeable boosters, special power ups and Farm Club animals to help you win those challenging levels
● Easy to play but challenging to master
● Acres of luscious levels and puzzles to complete - more added every 2 weeks!

Take on this epic saga alone or play with friends to see who can get the highest score!

Easily sync the game between devices and access full game features when connected to the internet

Farm Heroes Saga is free to play but optional in-game items require payment. You can turn off the payment feature by disabling in-app purchases in your device’s settings.

By downloading this game you are agreeing to our terms of service which can be found at https://king.com/termsAndConditions

Visit https://care.king.com/ or contact us in game by going to Settings > Customer Care if you need help!

Facebook @FarmHeroesSaga
Twitter @FarmHeroes
Instagram @FarmHeroesSaga
YouTube @FarmHeroesOfficial

Start matching and collecting Cropsies today! But most importantly have fun playing Farm Heroes Saga!

Do not sell my data: King shares your personal information with advertising partners to personalize ads. Learn more at https://king.com/privacyPolicy.  If you wish to exercise your Do Not Sell My Data rights, you can do so by contacting us via the in game help centre or by going to https://soporto.king.com/

comments: ["Farm heroes is an enjoyable game, frustrating but fun to play. Unlike some games, you're given a choice to watch ads or not. If you do watch the ad you're given extra turns or a \"booster\" that helps you through a level. I like that it's not just a \"matching\" game, there are other tasks. Get the sheep to the hay, make the hay, collect 🕷.....a variety of things to keep it interesting. It's great when you have down time or in my case stress relief.","Love this game. Very relaxing. A couple problems. Twice I've gotten quite a bit over level 1200. Twice all of the sudden I lost all of the boosters that I had accumulated. Another good booster would be the ability to switch two cropsies that were next to each other.","There's been a lot of improvement in the subtle types of rewards for moving ever onwards in the game. See if you can find one of the several incentives to go forward into the thousands. Don't like the improvement. There should be a way to get gold bars. Quests keep asking to get new companions. I have already gotten all of them. Don't like the new excessive amount of levels in the special events. Not really my favorite thing to get as a reward.... time with unlimited turns but thanks anyway!","Levels became way too hard to pass, practically impossible unless you have beans and extra help, and it all comes down to the lack of steps. Hard levels more often than not have only 9 or 16 steps for a complicated field so winning comes down to luck not ability. That's getting boring after playing 1000 levels like that. Make it more interesting instead of hard, that's more enjoyable.","Love this game. Like this version better than the new one. The levels are fun, win or lose, the graphics are better. It's a happy game. This is my favorite of the King brand games. I no longer think losing is fun. There are too many super hard levels. It gets boring if you can't win."]

title: Hangouts
description:
Use Hangouts to keep in touch. Message contacts, start free video or voice calls, and hop on a conversation with one person or a group. 

 • Include all your contacts with group chats for up to 150 people.
 • Say more with status messages, photos, videos, maps, emoji, stickers, and animated GIFs.
 • Turn any conversation into a free group video call with up to 10 contacts.
 • Call any phone number in the world (and all calls to other Hangouts users are free!).
 • Connect your Google Voice account for phone calling, SMS texting, and voicemail integration.
 • Keep in touch with contacts across Android, iOS, and the web, and sync chats across all your devices.
 • Message contacts anytime, even if they’re offline.
 
 Notes: Mobile carrier and ISP charges may apply. Calls to Hangouts users are free, but other calls might be charged. View our calling rates at https://www.google.com/hangouts/rates

Sometimes, the messages my friends send lag too. I cant see them until about a minute after they sent it. I tried to uninstall and reinstall the app already. My friend has this problem where she can't send pictures for an hour. Videos take too long to upload, I once sent a video and it uploaded an hour later! I'm not sure what's going on with it. Another problem is calls. When I call someone, I can't hear their voice. They aren't even muted! You need to resolve this issue it is very annoying and frustrating for both the sender as well as receiver because out of left field you are shut down with no notice . Please resolve this issue as soon as possible have been trying to login for couple hours now and keep getting booted out 🙄🤨🙁."]

title: Kids Animals Jigsaw Puzzles ❤️🦄
description:
If you or your children like jigsaw puzzles, you will LOVE Super Puzzle!

This game works almost like a real jigsaw puzzle for kids. When you select a piece it stays on the board even if you place it incorrectly, and you can move the piece until it slides to the correct place. 

Each relaxing puzzle features a beautiful scene drawn by a professional artist and a unique reward when the image is completed. The images include things like unicorns, dragons, or dinosaurs, and the rewards include balloons, fruits, snowflakes and many more!

You can play with 6, 9, 12, 16, 30, 56 or 72 pieces in order to adjust the difficulty to your child's skill level.

The game includes 3 additional free image collections to download! Choose between:
- Collection 2, a beautiful collection of mixed scenes
- Halloween, a scary mix of pumpkins, ghosts and typical things in a Halloween game
- Christmas, a mix with Santa Claus, snowmen and other classic Xmas game images.

Features:

descriptionHTML:
If you or your children like jigsaw puzzles, you will LOVE Super Puzzle!

This game works almost like a real jigsaw puzzle for kids. When you select a piece it stays on the board even if you place it incorrectly, and you can move the piece until it slides to the correct place.

Each relaxing puzzle features a beautiful scene drawn by a professional artist and a unique reward when the image is completed. The images include things like unicorns, dragons, or dinosaurs, and the rewards include balloons, fruits, snowflakes and many more!

You can play with 6, 9, 12, 16, 30, 56 or 72 pieces in order to adjust the difficulty to your child's skill level.

The game includes 3 additional free image collections to download! Choose between:
- Collection 2, a beautiful collection of mixed scenes
- Halloween, a scary mix of pumpkins, ghosts and typical things in a Halloween game
- Christmas, a mix with Santa Claus, snowmen and other classic Xmas game images.

Features:
- 80+ different kids jigsaw puzzles with gorgeous HD graphics

title: Firefox Browser: fast, private & safe web browser
description:
Introducing our latest release of Firefox for Android browser — Firefox Daylight. This version of the Firefox web browser is dramatically redesigned to be faster, easy to use, customizable and private. Firefox browser features Enhanced Tracking Protection on by default blocking thousands of annoying ad trackers and malware — making your experience more secure, and a lot faster too. Firefox is also the only major browser backed by a not-for-profit fighting to give you more openness, transparency and control of your life online. Download the Firefox for Android browser today and keep the internet open for tomorrow. 

FAST. PRIVATE. SAFE.
Firefox for Android browser gives you effortless privacy protection with lighting-fast page loads. Enhanced Tracking Protection automatically blocks over 2000 known online trackers from invading your privacy and slowing down your pages. Firefox browser also introduces a clean new design that makes it easier to get more things done, more quickly. Plus, with smart browsing features built in, Firefox lets you take your privacy, passwords, and bookmarks with you safely wherever you go.

 ONE TAP TO PRIVATE MODE 
Now you can get to Private Browsing Mode with just one tap. And when you close Private Browsing Mode, your browsing history gets automatically erased from your device. 

CUSTOMIZE THE WAY YOU WANT TO SEARCH
Keep the search bar up top. Or move it to the bottom. Firefox browser not only lets you choose how you search but also how much of your personal data to share. Customizable Enhanced Tracking Protection settings put you in the driver’s seat with your data. You also have your choice of search engines, and the ability to make Firefox your default browser.

GO DARK MODE
Easily switch to Dark Mode anytime to give your eyes and your battery a break. 

COLLECTIONS
Open as many tabs as you like and organize them into Collections to stay on task. Collections can also be shared across devices so you get more done no matter where you are or what device you’re using.  

GET ADD-ONS
Full support for the most popular add-ons, including ways to turbo-charge powerful default privacy settings and customize your experience.

PICK UP RIGHT WHERE YOU LEFT OFF
Start using Firefox for Android on your phone then switch to the Firefox browser on your laptop, without skipping a beat. With Firefox across your devices you can take your bookmarks, saved logins and browsing history wherever you go. Firefox browser also takes the guesswork out of passwords by remembering your passwords across devices. Have the choice to instantly send open tabs between your phone and computer, instead of texting or emailing yourself articles to read later. 

FIREFOX WEB BROWSER SEARCH WIDGET
No need to open the app. Search the web directly from your device’s home screen. Add the Firefox for Android browser search widget and get instant results without the extra taps. 

PICTURE IN PICTURE MODE
Stream and pop videos out and play them in the background while you do other things on your phone. It’s entertainment and multitasking, together on the same screen. 

Learn more about Firefox for Android:
- Have questions or need help? Visit https://support.mozilla.org/mobile
- Read about Firefox permissions: https://mzl.la/Permissions
- Follow Firefox on Twitter: https://mzl.la/FXTwitter

About Mozilla
Mozilla exists to build the Internet as a public resource accessible to all because we believe open and free is better than closed and controlled. We build products like Firefox to promote choice and transparency and give people more control over their lives online. Learn more at https://www.mozilla.org

Privacy Policy: https://www.mozilla.org/legal/privacy/firefox.html

comments: ["This new app sucks. The app was fine. Look at the reviews for clarity. I have no way of going back to the old version? I NEVER would've updated to this. Where are my pinned sites? Where's the print? Save to PDF? Downloads? Tools and page tabs? I'm so confused. You want $? I'll donate, but pls don't fall in line with the rest of the hacks. You're the same now. Major suck. I believed in you guys for years. Major interface changes are rarely improvements. 🤔","Getting better. The recent update seems to have fix a few of my complaints. The tab switching UI is still an issue. It's confusing and hard to work with, and the \"Go\" button is missing from the address bar. Searching in the address bar also still causes drowndown items to shift, but other things like addon support, the blank tab page, and scrolling are all fixed. :)","I'm sure there are some good things about the new version behind the scenes but the interface is a royal pain to deal with. Address bar at the bottom (you can change it back to the top at least). Bookmarks no longer on the startup/home page, was replaced by collections (which I have no use for), the closest thing to the bookmarks on the home page is the \"add to top sites\" option. The tabs page is less useful, the old tabs page was cleaner.","It is a pain to use the new version. Very slow to load pages. Buggy like hell. File downloads fail at times. I went back to another popular browser (one which is perceived to be a memory hog) and found it refreshingly snappy. With the current layoffs at Mozilla, this could very well be the end of Firefox, a browser which I have used for over a decade.","I've used Firefox for desktop and mobile for quite a while now, and have always been happy. The most recent update to the Android app, however, has led to LastPass no longer working, and apparently other third party (read: non-Mozilla) password managers are similarly impacted. After some back and forth with LastPass, I've been told that LP is no longer compatible with Firefox mobile due to recent policy updates from Mozilla. So, now I'm left to decide between the browser I prefer and an absolutely necessary tool for security and convenience. That's not a tough choice, honestly. Time to find a new browser!"]

title: Messenger Lite: Free Calls & Messages
description:
A fast and data-efficient messaging app to reach the people in your life. 

Messenger Lite:
- Installs quickly. It's less than 10MB to download!
- Saves data. It loads fast, runs efficiently and uses less mobile data.
- Works everywhere. Reach people when you're in an area with a slow or unstable internet connection.

With Messenger Lite, you can:
- Contact anyone on Messenger, Facebook or Facebook Lite.
- See when people are active and available to chat.
- Message people one-on-one or in groups to catch up or make plans.
- Send photos, links, or express yourself with stickers.
- Make one-on-one voice and video calls for free over Wi-Fi (otherwise standard data charges apply). Talk as long as you want, even with people in other countries!

title: Pet World - WildLife America - animal game
description:
Look after wild animals and nurse them back to health: in WildLife - America you can care for animals from the North American wilderness, cure their illnesses and tend their injuries so that they can move to new homes with new owners or be released back into the wild!

★ The exciting sequel to PetWorld with lots of new animals including squirrels, raccoons, skunks, wolves and bears.
★ Brand new: take care of sweet otters and mustang horses that need your help!
★ Identify what your patients need and nurse them back to health.
★ The more experience you gather, the better the objects you can unlock and use to fit out your enclosures.
★ Realistic graphics and cute animations make WildLife - America an unforgettable gaming experience.

The wild animals are on the loose! 
In WildLife - America you can now look after the many endangered species from the forests in the tundra of Canada and Alaska. Like in PetWorld, you will experience the excitement of the daily life of an animal keeper – this time at a wildlife rescue center. The rangers desperately need some skilled helpers for their team as more and more animals arrive at the reserve needing your help!
Treat injured wolves, diagnose the bears' illnesses and find new homes for your charges with trustworthy, caring new owners – it's all up to you! But before you can pass the animals into experienced hands, you'll need to nurse them back to health. 

With WildLife - America you can now also customize the enclosures of your animals
Whether it's a pen for the raccoons or trees for the exuberant squirrels to frolic around in – let your imagination run wild! To make sure your animals feel at home during their stay and have an appropriate habitat, you can set up their enclosures to be as close to nature as possible.

Experience the exciting gameplay of PetWorld in a new environment. Look forward to lots of exciting new expansions. So what are you waiting for? Head of to the wildlife park, help the rangers and nurse your wild patients back to health!

If you have questions or problems related to the app or in-app purchases, please feel free to contact us via our facebook page facebook.com/tivolamobile

title: Weather Live
description:
Check the weather around you and all over the world at a glance.
Rely on the accurate weather forecast and adjust your schedule to the weather coming in. You won’t even have to look out the window as the app will bring current weather just inside your house! 

Weather is sometimes difficult to predict. This accurate weather app allows to find out a detailed 14 day weather forecast (7 in the free version) wherever you are, for any time of the day or for the next days just by tapping on the icons:
- Current and “Feels like” temperature
- Lightning tracker
- Wind speed and direction
- Pressure and precipitation weather information
- Sunrise/sunset time
- Weather Radar & Rain maps
- Visibility (weather conditions for driving)
- Weather alerts & current condition notifications
and other useful weather data accompanied by live animations and graphics.

Want to customize the way the weather is displayed? You can easily switch between detailed or compact layout to get weather information that is relevant for you. By the way, you can even rearrange weather blocks to spot first things first!

In addition, you can check the weather forecast even without opening the app. A visually appealing widget is easily integrated into your screen. You can set up the weather widget in any of the nine handy options. Choose a detailed full-size widget or keep your home screen as clean as possible with just the essential weather information.

Go Premium and get access to interactive weather maps for the whole duration of your plan. Moreover,, become a Premium user and enjoy ad-free weather on your device.

You can choose from different subscription options:
* A subscription with a free trial will automatically renew to a paid subscription unless you cancel the subscription before the end of the free trial period.
* Cancel a free trial or subscription anytime through your account settings on the Google Play Store and continue to enjoy the premium content until the end of the free-trial period or paid subscription!

Please note that some supplementary features & weather details in the basic (free) version are subject to limitations (ex. UV index, 14 day weather forecast, Sun and Moon, Lightning tracker, Visibility, Air Quality index etc.). These limitations are also subject to change.

By downloading this application, you agree to the Apalon Apps End User License Agreement and Privacy Policy.

A clear and simple live weather app will show you everything you need to know about the weather in any part of the world. Use the weather app to stay tuned with mother nature right on your device.

Enjoy the perfect balance of beautiful pixels and accurate weather forecast!

Privacy Policy: http://apalon.com/privacy_policy.html
California Privacy Notice: https://apalon.com/privacy_policy.html#h
EULA: http://www.apalon.com/terms_of_use.html
AdChoices: http://www.apalon.com/privacy_policy.html#4

title: Dicedom - Merge Puzzle
description:
Dicedom - Merge Puzzle

Dicedom is a amazing board game. Roll the dice, match 3 same dice to merge magic dice. 
It's a offline game. 
It is a completely free game.
Easy to play and hard to master.

How to play:
Play on 5X5 tiles wood board. Each tile you can only put one dice.
You can't merge different number dice.
There are 6 Colors Domino dice.
Roll the dice to get new dices.
You can rotate dices before placing them.
Match three same color dice to merge.
Three 6 dots dice can be merged to a jewel cube dice. It's a magic dice. Merge three jewel dice can crush 3x3 nearby dices.
The game will be over when game board is no place for putting the dices !



Features:
Real 3D quality game.
Perfect wooden UI.
Challenge brain game.
one of the best time kill game.
Train your brain and develop your logic with this simple game.
Real time rank and Compete with your friends.
It’s the 5x5 dice jigsaw making your brain healthy for a happy life.
Perfectly small install size that won’t hurt your storage.
Beautifully easy and simple, no pressure and no time limit.

Let's start this game, become a legend, challenge ourselves.
